member.name: T:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInferenceOutcome
member.summary: Represents the execution outcome of an AI / Semantic Router SQL query over .cff Parquet files.

member.name: T:GSTFlow.Rules.InferenceMode
member.summary: Configuration for the Dual-Mode Edge AI Inference Engine

member.name: M:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInference.routePromptToDuckDbSql(System.String)
member.summary: Deterministic air-gapped semantic router that translates natural language prompts into vectorized DuckDB Parquet SQL.

member.name: P:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInference.duckDbCffGbnfGrammar
member.summary: The strict GBNF grammar constraining LLM outputs to valid DuckDB Parquet SELECT queries over .cff containers.

member.name: M:GSTFlow.Rules.LocalLlmClient.inferDuckDbSqlAsync(System.String,GSTFlow.Rules.InferenceMode)
member.summary: Main entry point for dynamic Natural Language to SQL Inference. Implements the Dual-Mode Strategy: Onnx -> Ollama -> Semantic Router.

member.name: M:GSTFlow.Rules.LocalLlmClient.tryQueryOnnxInProcess(System.String)
member.summary: Distribution mode: Executes an ONNX-quantized Gemma model fully in-process. Requires Microsoft.ML.OnnxRuntimeGenAI NuGet package (Zero-dependency deployment).

member.name: M:GSTFlow.Rules.LocalLlmClient.tryQueryOllamaAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Development / Troubleshooting mode: Calls local Ollama server over HTTP. This provides excellent DevEx without polluting the F# project with C++ native ML bindings.
